## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.toProductionJournalEntry() method

Creates a production journal entry from this session. Records the produced confection with resolved concrete choices.

**Signature:**

```typescript
toProductionJournalEntry(notes?: ICategorizedNote[]): Result<IConfectionProductionJournalEntry>;
```
